final_reply.text: I think Ada Lovelace worked with Charles Babbage because that relation is stored in memory. Evidence source: chat. Confidence: 1.000.
I think Ada Lovelace worked with Charles Babbage because that relation is stored in memory. Evidence source: chat. Confidence: 1.000.
